title: monticalia gelida
intro: Monticalia gelida, also known as the Glacier Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Andes mountains in South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been shown to have antimicrobial and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Monticalia gelida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Monticalia gelida often involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, or using the plant's roots to create a tincture or decoction.
